name: Stem Cell Replacement and Transplantation Surveillance for June 6, 2026
summary: Activity-only surveillance bundle refreshing the exPDite-2 bemdaneprocel phase 3 registry date while keeping the public outlook, stage, momentum, confidence, and LEV-relevant interpretation unchanged.

scope.question: What changed for Stem Cell Replacement and Transplantation since the June 1, 2026 public baseline publication, and does any change justify a public update?

proposed_changes.summary: Refresh exPDite-2 registry source summary to the June 5, 2026 posted update.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry remains recruiting with no posted results, but the public source currently cites the older May 1, 2026 posted update.

proposed_changes.summary: Refresh the exPDite-2 recruiting finding to the June 5, 2026 posted update while preserving the no-results caveat.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding is a momentum/activity statement only. Updating the as-of date keeps the source layer current without implying efficacy evidence.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: No outlook change is proposed. The registry update is activity-only: exPDite-2 remains recruiting, has no posted results, and continues to support momentum only.

next_actions: Run source-fidelity and interpretation/forecast evidence reviews for the activity-only registry refresh.
If approved and published, return the track to ordinary surveillance with special watch on exPDite-2 results, laromestrocel replication, and long-term graft safety signals.
